news.headline: PGD Airport seeks bids for $200,000 reimbursement on restaurant buildout to meet growing demand.
news.summary: In Punta Gorda, Florida, as of October 23, 2024, Punta Gorda Airport has put out a call for bids for a public full-service restaurant, bar, and caterer at the PGD Air Center. There is a strong demand for food service from employees, local residents, and aviators, with the need increasing in line with the growth in commercial and residential activities at the airport.

news.headline: GE Aerospace partners with Lilium to enhance eVTOL safety. They will develop a FDM/FOQA program, offer FDM for customers. Event Measurement System used in Lilium's POWER-ON program.
news.summary: GE Aerospace and Lilium N.V. have joined forces to establish a robust safety standard for electric Vertical Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircrafts, as they approach their commercial debut. The collaboration involves the development of an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) level Flight Data Monitoring (FDM) or Flight Operations Quality Assurance (FOQA) initiative for monitoring eVTOL safety across the entire fleet. Additionally, GE Aerospace and Lilium aim to introduce an optional FDM program for Lilium’s clients. GE’s Event Measurement System platform is set to be a vital component of Lilium’s aftermarket initiative known as “POWER-ON,” which is designed to provide secure, efficient, and client-centric solutions.

news.headline: FDA approves Pfizer's Abrysvo vaccine for adults under 60 to prevent RSV. It's the only vaccine for pregnant people as well.
news.summary: Pfizer Inc's Abrysvo (RSVpreF vaccine) has been approved by the FDA for individuals aged 18-59 at high risk, to prevent lower respiratory tract disease caused by RSV. This extends the vaccine's indication to the broadest for adults, including those previously aged 60 and older. Abrysvo is also the only RSV immunization authorized for pregnant individuals at gestation weeks 32-36, safeguarding infants up to 6 months old. The FDA's decision was influenced by the pivotal Phase 3 MONeT study.

news.headline: Bureau Veritas reports strong Q3 2024 with EUR 1,547.9 million revenue (up 8.8% YoY), 13.0% organic growth across all sectors.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Neuilly-sur-Seine, France, reported key figures for the quarter, including a revenue of EUR 1,547.9 million. This marked an 8.8% increase year-on-year and a 13.0% organic growth. All business sectors experienced significant organic growth compared to the same quarter in 2023. Industry showed a growth of +23.8%, Certification at +17.7%, Marine & Offshore at +13.2%, Buildings & Infrastructure at +9.3%, Agri-Food & Commodities at +8.5%, and Consumer Products Services at +7.5%. Additionally, there was a positive scope effect of 0.5% during the period.

news.headline: Amplify has launched the Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (SMAP), targeting the growing small and mid-cap market. Small-caps are up 6.97% YTD and 29.72% in a year, while mid-caps have gained 13.39% YTD and 32.56% in a year.
news.summary: Investors now have the chance to delve into small- and mid-cap companies with the recent launch of the Amplify Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NYSE: SMAP). This ETF arrives at a favorable time, as small- and mid-cap stocks have been performing better than their larger counterparts. Year-to-date, small-cap stocks, as represented by the iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF (NYSE: IJR), have seen a 6.97% increase and a 29.72% rise over the past year. Meanwhile, mid-cap stocks, tracked by the iShares Core S&P Mid-Cap ETF (NYSE: IJH), have experienced a 13.39% gain YTD and a 32.56% increase over the past year. The launch of Amplify's new ETF provides investors with an opportunity to capitalize on this trend. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

Festi hf. to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 30, investor meeting on Oct 31.
news.summary: The global annual death toll due to air pollution has reached a staggering 7 million, with more than 90% of the world's population breathing unsafe air outdoors. The economic cost of air pollution, including healthcare, welfare, and lost productivity, is estimated to be around $5 trillion annually. Furthermore, studies have shown that exposure to air pollution increases the risk of stroke, heart disease, lung cancer, and respiratory illnesses, making it a major public health concern. Authorities and policymakers are being urged to take immediate action to improve air quality and reduce the detrimental effects of pollution on human health.

Additionally, it anticipates the participation of 50 official delegations.

This achievement was reached over two years earlier than planned. LISC is now...

news.headline: Mason Investment Advisory Services rises to 61st place in Barron's "2024 Top 100 RIA Firms" list, up by 16 spots.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia on October 23, 2024, Mason Investment Advisory Services, Inc. (Mason), a financial planning firm, was honored to secure a spot in Barron's 2024 Top 100 RIA Firms list. Moving up 16 spots, they ranked 61st in the prestigious list. Mason is a registered investment advisory firm based in Reston, VA, marking a significant milestone in their continued growth and success.

news.headline: VOICE & AI and GovAI Summit to address election security amid AI influence by China, Russia, and Iran. Event at Hyatt Regency Crystal City Oct. 28-30.
news.summary: In Washington DC, the forthcoming VOICE & AI and GovAI Summit is set to convene key AI specialists and government officials to address critical subjects such as election security. With just a week left until the crucial U.S. election, the intelligence community has flagged China, Russia, and Iran as countries aiming to sway the results by leveraging AI to produce content in line with their beliefs. Scheduled for October 28-30 at the Hyatt Regency Crystal City, the conferences will provide a unique platform for discussions.

news.headline: EydisBio receives $0.5M grant to advance TAK1 Inhibitor for Alzheimer's Disease. Company focused on autoimmune treatments.
news.summary: EydisBio, a pioneering pharmaceutical firm based in Durham, North Carolina, with a focus on creating new therapies for autoimmune and inflammatory conditions, recently revealed that it has secured a $0.5 million grant for Phase I of the Small Business Innovation Research program.

news.headline: Florida Cancer Specialists present advancements at Pharmacy Summit in Orlando featuring former Olympian patient. #FCS #NCODA2024 #oncology
news.summary: An ex-Olympic athlete and FCS patient, along with pharmacy experts and executives from Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute (FCS), are prominently participating in the NCODA 2024 Fall Summit in Orlando this week. The former patient will share insights on maintaining a champion's mindset. This involvement signifies FCS's dedication to cancer care, with the summit being a platform for industry leaders to discuss advancements in the field. The event, taking place on October 23, 2024, highlights the importance of collaboration and innovation in oncology, with important discussions expected to involve the sharing of knowledge and experience.

news.headline: Illinois American Water invests in Alton's infrastructure with projects including UV equipment installation, sewer separation, and water main replacement.
news.summary: Illinois American Water is making significant investments in its water and wastewater infrastructure in the Alton District. The recent projects in the area involve the installation of ultraviolet treatment equipment at the Alton water treatment plant, a sewer separation project in downtown Alton, and the replacement of a water main along 9th Street between Atkinson Avenue and Market Street. The company's focus on proactive investment is evident in the continuous efforts to improve water quality and service in the Alton District and statewide.

news.headline: Rackspace Technology recognized as a leader in four ISG Provider Lens AWS categories for 2024, known for its advanced technologies and talent assets.
news.summary: Rackspace is recognized for providing a highly advanced technology platform and a skilled workforce.

news.headline: Oracle named leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Cloud Platform Services, offering 150+ AI services globally.
news.summary: Oracle stands out as the sole hyperscaler equipped to offer over 150 AI and cloud services across public, dedicated, and hybrid cloud setups globally. The company provides built-in AI services, top-notch generative AI models, and robust AI infrastructure capacities. Oracle remains a leader in delivering these services, demonstrating its strength in the AI and cloud sectors with its wide range of offerings.

news.headline: AuditBoard enhances AI capabilities for audit, risk, and compliance. 89% organizations interested in using AI.
news.summary: At the 2024 Audit & Beyond Conference in Las Vegas, AuditBoard revealed its advanced AI tools are enhancing audit, risk, compliance, and ESG management functions. These innovations aim to automate critical tasks and enhance risk management. A survey by AuditBoard and Ascend2 Research discovered that 89% of organizations intend to leverage AI; however, many are hindered by concerns like data privacy. This indicates a strong interest in AI adoption within companies, despite existing challenges.

news.headline: Entrust named leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Identity Verification.
news.summary: Entrust, based in Minneapolis, has achieved a significant milestone by being placed in the Leaders’ Quadrant in the first-ever Gartner Magic Quadrant for Identity Verification (IDV). Gartner’s recognition of Entrust’s position highlights the company's excellence and leadership in the field of identity verification. This acknowledgment is a key achievement for Entrust, emphasizing its strong market presence and innovative solutions in the IDV sector.

news.headline: HNO International partners with Dumore Enterprises to test hydrogen carbon cleaner technology. OTCPink: HNOI.
news.summary: In Houston on October 23, 2024, HNO International, Inc. (OTC: HNOI), a prominent company in hydrogen-based clean energy solutions, revealed a significant partnership with Dumore Enterprises, well-known for providing oilfield and industrial services. This joint venture seeks to pioneer testing and implementation of innovative technologies in the field.

news.headline: BlueMark launches Fund ID, an impact rating system analyzing investors across 4 pillars: Strategy, Governance, Management, Reporting.
news.summary: BlueMark, a prominent independent impact verification and intelligence provider based in New York, has introduced a comprehensive assessment tool that evaluates an investor's impact in terms of Strategy, Governance, Management, and Reporting. Launched on October 23, 2024, this tool aims to provide a holistic view of an investor's impact across these key pillars. By analyzing various aspects of impact accountability, BlueMark seeks to enhance transparency and understanding in the realm of impact investing.

news.headline: Aquimo Inc. appoints Shachi Singh as CTO & Andrea Bailey as CRO to drive growth. MoAtech for sports broadcasts.
news.summary: Aquimo Inc., a prominent company in massive-multiplayer mobile gaming technology for sports broadcasts and live events, announced the promotion of Shachi Singh to Chief Technology Officer. In addition, Andrea Bailey has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer to spearhead the expansion of the sales and technology teams. The developments were shared from MESA, Arizona on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: President & CEO Jeffrey A. Isaacson retires after 10 years at Universities Space Research Association.
news.summary: The Universities Space Research Association (USRA), a non-profit organization dedicated to advancing space and aeronautics-related science and technology, revealed on October 23, 2024, the retirement of its President and Chief Executive Officer, Jeffrey A. Isaacson, who served in the position for a decade.

news.headline: Sterilization equipment market projected to reach $26.77B by 2031 per Meticulous Research® report.

The report highlights the market size, share, forecast, and trends analysis. It includes information regarding various offerings in the market, such as equipment types like Heat (Moist - Gravity, High-speed; Dry - Static Air, Forced Air), and Low-temperature (ETO...). The report covers significant data and statistics critical for understanding the market dynamics.

news.headline: New remote-controlled equipment will benefit 4,900 West Penn Power customers in Western Pennsylvania to prevent power disruptions.
news.summary: Close to 4,900 customers of West Penn Power in western Pennsylvania are set to benefit from recent upgrades. The improvements are being carried out by FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE). The upgrades aim to enhance the efficiency and reliability of the power service in the region.

news.headline: 94% of Nova Scotia school support staff vote to strike, 5,000 workers demanding better treatment in public education.
news.summary: In Nova Scotia, school support staff in eight CUPE locals have voted in favor of job action, with a significant 94% of workers supporting a strike mandate. This decision, made by 5,000 workers, reflects their unwavering commitment to their demands and solidarity. The outcome of the strike votes, concluded last week, highlights the prevailing issues in public education in the province, as mentioned by Nan McFadgen, President of the union.

news.headline: Oct 23, 2024: Oriental Rise Holding Limited’s underwriter, US Tiger Securities, exercises full over-allotment option buying 262,500 shares at $4 each, raising $8.05M total.
news.summary: Ningde, China, October 23, 2024 - Oriental Rise Holding Limited, a leading tea product supplier in China listed as ORIS on NasdaqCM, disclosed that US Tiger Securities, Inc. served as the underwriter and sole book-runner for their IPO. They recently exercised the full over-allotment option by purchasing an additional 262,500 ordinary shares from the Company at $4.00 per share, increasing the gross proceeds to $8.05 million before deductions for underwriting discounts and expenses. This move followed the issuance of a total of 2,012,500 ordinary shares during the IPO.

news.headline: Innovative Food Holdings fulfilled its largest purchase order, marking a significant milestone for the company.
news.summary: In its recent announcement, Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. disclosed the successful fulfillment of the largest purchase order in the company's history. This significant achievement showcases the company's growth and continued success in the industry. The order, which amounted to a substantial sum of [insert specific amount here], highlights the trust and confidence customers place in the quality and service provided by the company. This milestone underscores Innovative Food Holdings, Inc.'s commitment to meeting the needs of its clients and solidifying its position as a key player in the market.

news.headline: Aspira Women’s Health awarded $10 million by ARPA-H to develop blood test for endometriosis detection.
news.summary: Aspira is working on creating a blood test using multiple miRNA markers for the detection of endometriosis. This innovative test aims to improve early detection of the condition, which affects approximately 1 in 10 women of reproductive age. The use of miRNA markers may enhance the accuracy of diagnosis and lead to timely treatment for individuals with endometriosis. By developing this test, Aspira seeks to provide a valuable tool for healthcare professionals in identifying and managing this common gynecological disorder.

news.headline: Exact Market, a woman-owned tech marketing agency, enhances B2B video services to meet growing demand for digital storytelling.
news.summary: Exact Market, a technology marketing agency certified by WBENC and led by a woman, has unveiled an extensive range of video services designed for current go-to-market strategies and partner campaigns. This announcement was made on October 23, 2024, in San Diego. The company, known for its video offerings, has taken a step further in enhancing its services to cater to the evolving needs of businesses.

news.headline: Baffin conducts product testing in Iceland, facing unpredictable weather and challenging terrain.
news.summary: Baffin, a Canadian brand known for cold-climate footwear and apparel, is gearing up for its latest expedition in Iceland. The challenging terrain and unpredictable weather conditions are expected to provide an ideal setting for product testing. The expedition is scheduled to commence on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: CodeSignal launches AI Interviewer for Sales to speed up hiring process with AI-powered interviews, improving sales talent acquisition.
news.summary: Today, October 23, 2024, in San Francisco, CodeSignal introduces AI Interviewer for Sales, an innovative AI-driven interview tool aimed at assisting companies in recruiting top sales professionals efficiently. This platform offers customization features and is designed to streamline the hiring process.

news.headline: Newmark advises on $162M sale of The Plaza at Walnut Creek, largest multi-tenant office sale on West Coast since 20221.
news.summary: In a significant development in the real estate sector, the recent sale of The Plaza at Walnut Creek marks a major milestone as the largest multi-tenant trophy office sale on the West Coast since 2021. Newmark recently disclosed their advisory role in this transaction involving the prestigious 362,399-square-foot office complex located in the heart of San Francisco. This sale showcases the robust nature of the market with a high-value sale of such magnitude in a key business hub.

news.summary: A recent report titled "The State of AI During the Great Burnout" by Innovaccer in San Francisco delves into the impact of AI in alleviating administrative tasks and lessening clinician burnout. The study sheds light on the potential of AI technology to streamline processes and reduce burdens on healthcare professionals.

Net Health and Tali to integrate AI tech for faster EHR documentation, allowing more provider-patient time.

By implementing this technology, healthcare providers will save time on admin tasks and gain more valuable time with patients. The partnership was disclosed on Oct. 23, 2024, in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. This innovation is poised to revolutionize the healthcare industry, potentially impacting thousands of healthcare professionals across the nation.
